hero.title:
Elevate Your Style
with Couture Craftsmanship.
hero.subtitle: Expertly Designed. Personally Crafted. Distinctly You.

about.heading: Where Artistry Meets Exceptional Craftsmanship.
about.description: At Himani Studio, we believe fashion is a personal expression. With over fifteen years of design expertise, we create bespoke garments that reflect your individual style and lifestyle. Our founder, Himani Desai — a celebrated fashion designer with training in Paris and Milan — leads a dedicated team committed to understanding each client's vision. We combine creative excellence with meticulous attention to detail, premium materials, and personalized service to deliver distinctive pieces that make a lasting impression. Every garment is a masterpiece designed exclusively for you.
about.vision: To become the preferred destination for sophisticated, personalized fashion that celebrates individuality and empowers our clients to express their authentic style.
about.mission: To craft exceptional bespoke garments that combine creative vision, superior craftsmanship, and premium quality, ensuring every piece reflects the unique personality and preferences of our clients.

items.title: Dedicated Design Team for Your Vision
Founder Trained by International Fashion Houses
Bespoke Couture Design
items.desc: Complete custom design from concept to creation, including personal style consultation, fabric selection, and unlimited revisions.

items.title: Bridal & Occasion Wear
items.desc: Exquisite wedding and formal event collections designed to capture your vision and celebrate your special moments in elegance.

items.title: Wardrobe Styling & Consultation
items.desc: Expert guidance on building a cohesive wardrobe that reflects your personality, lifestyle, and individual aesthetic preferences.

caseStudies.title: Ananya's Dream Wedding
caseStudies.desc: Ananya envisioned a traditional bridal lehenga that honored her heritage while reflecting modern elegance. After three consultation sessions, we created a stunning forest sage silk lehenga with intricate zari and pearl embroidery. The custom-fitted choli and dupatta were crafted to perfection, making her the radiant centerpiece of her wedding day.

caseStudies.title: Corporate Executive Refresh
caseStudies.desc: Priya needed a refined collection of formal wear that projected confidence and professionalism. We designed five custom blazers, tailored trousers, and elegant formal dresses in premium fabrics. Each piece was meticulously fitted and created to seamlessly mix and match, giving her a versatile, cohesive professional wardrobe.

caseStudies.title: Mother of the Bride
caseStudies.project: Custom Evening Saree with Modern Draping
caseStudies.desc: Deepa wanted an elegant saree that balanced tradition with contemporary style for her daughter's wedding. We created a luxurious handloom saree with subtle embellishments and innovative draping techniques. The result was a showstopping piece that made her feel elegant, comfortable, and appropriately celebratory.

caseStudies.title: International Diplomat's Wardrobe
caseStudies.desc: Through a referral from a satisfied client, we began creating custom formal wear and casual elegant pieces for an Indian diplomat stationed abroad. Over five years, we've designed multiple collections that combine Indian sophistication with international style sensibilities.

caseStudies.title: Festival Fashion Series
caseStudies.desc: A regular client engaged us to design an entire seasonal wardrobe featuring festival wear, casual elegance, and everyday fashion. Our collaborative approach resulted in a cohesive collection of fifteen pieces that celebrate her personal style across all occasions.

caseStudies.title: Engagement Ceremony Outfit
caseStudies.desc: Meera sought a modern interpretation of traditional engagement attire. We designed a bespoke contemporary ethnic outfit featuring handpicked fabrics, innovative silhouette, and personalized embroidery. The piece perfectly captured her blend of tradition and modernity.

contact.heading: Start Your Bespoke Fashion Journey
contact.subheading: Schedule a personal consultation with our design team to explore your custom fashion needs and experience the Himani Studio difference.

footer.tagline: Bespoke fashion design and couture craftsmanship for the discerning individual. Elevating personal style through expertly crafted, custom-designed garments.
